description:
A billing coordinator at a family practice needs to add a new insurance company to FreeMED so that patient coverage can be properly recorded. Add a new insurance company record with the following details:

- Company Name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts
- Address Line 1: 101 Huntington Avenue
- City: Boston
- State: MA
- Zip Code: 02199
- Phone: 8002622583

FreeMED is already open in Firefox at http://localhost/freemed/ and you are logged in as admin (username: admin, password: admin).

metadata.expected_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts
